title: antidesma khasianum
intro: Antidesma khasianum, also known as the Khasi staff tree or Khasian staff tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Antidesma khasianum are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant protection. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, often used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
